summary: Iteration 69 - Photographer Session Workflow & UX Testing: Successfully verified ConditionsModal gatekeeper, Settings Modal, and PhotographerSessionsManager UI. LiveStatusHUD and EndSessionModal code verified but not testable without active session.

go_live_gatekeeper_flow.details: Go Live button triggers location permission -> Settings Modal -> ConditionsModal. Sequential flow works correctly with mocked geolocation.

conditions_modal.details: ConditionsModal appears after clicking 'Next: Add Conditions' in Settings Modal. Contains: Conditions Check title, spot name display, Take Photo button, Record Video button, Upload from gallery option, Spot Notes textarea, Go Live final button (disabled until media uploaded), Cancel button, and warning message 'Add a condition photo or video to enable Go Live'.

settings_modal.details: Live Session Rates modal contains: Surf Spot dropdown (18 spots), Session Buy-in ($25/surfer), Photos Included (3), Live Session Photo Rates ($5/photo), Max Surfers (10), Duration (2 hrs), Auto-Accept toggle.

photographer_sessions_page.details: PhotographerSessionsManager renders correctly with: Live Sessions header, Start a Live Session card with Go Live button, Session Setup card, Potential Earnings calculator, Live Session Pricing card, Session History section.

live_status_hud.details: LiveStatusHUD component correctly integrated in MapPage.js (line 1264) and PhotographerSessionsManager.js (line 659). Shows when currentUserShooting is truthy. Contains blinking LIVE indicator, session timer, End Session button. Not testable in automation without active session.

end_session_modal.details: EndSessionModal imported and integrated in both MapPage.js (lines 2087-2089) and PhotographerSessionsManager.js (lines 1639+). Shows session summary (duration, surfers, earnings), 'End Session' and 'Keep Shooting' buttons. Triggers redirect to Impacted tab on confirm.

photo_tools_tab.details: Photo Tools navigation works, expands to show: My Gallery, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions (highlighted), Earnings Dashboard sub-items.

critical_code_review_comments: ConditionsModal Go Live button correctly uses canGoLive = !!conditionMedia for disabled state (line 215, 427 in ConditionsModal.js)
LiveStatusHUD uses useSessionTimer custom hook for real-time timer display
EndSessionModal uses formatTime from LiveStatusHUD for duration formatting
Kill switch logic redirects to /impacted after session end (PhotographerSessionsManager.js line 576)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new components verified: ConditionsModal.js (gatekeeper requiring media before Go Live), LiveStatusHUD.js (persistent HUD with blinking LIVE indicator and timer), EndSessionModal.js (kill switch confirmation). Settings Modal appears before ConditionsModal. Go Live flow requires geolocation permission. LiveStatusHUD only appears when currentUserShooting is truthy (photographer has active session). EndSessionModal redirects to /impacted after confirming end session. All data-testids properly implemented for automated testing.
notes: LiveStatusHUD and EndSessionModal were code-verified but not UI-tested since they require an active photographer session which needs camera/media upload to complete Go Live flow.
